context.positionState.unrealizedPnl.desc: Profit and loss not yet realized (+/-)

context.powerType.label: Delegated power type
context.powerType.desc: Scope of the delegation: voting or proposal power

context.priceImpactBp.label: Price impact
context.priceImpactBp.desc: How much this trade moves the market price (100 = 1%)

context.proof.label: Merkle proof
context.proof.desc: List of Merkle sibling hashes proving claim eligibility

context.protocol.label: Protocol contract address
context.protocol.desc: Address of the lending protocol the permission applies to (Aave)

context.protocolName.label: Protocol name
context.protocolName.desc: Name of the protocol type (e.g. Balancer V2)

context.rateMode.label: Rate mode
context.rateMode.desc: Whether the rate is variable or stable (Aave)

context.rawDelegationType.label: Delegation type code
context.rawDelegationType.desc: Code of the delegation type recorded on-chain

context.receiveAToken.label: Receive as aToken
context.receiveAToken.desc: Whether seized collateral is received as aTokens (Aave)

context.receiveAsTokens.label: Receive as tokens
context.receiveAsTokens.desc: True to receive tokens, false to redeposit as shares

context.reduceOnly.label: Reduce-only flag
context.reduceOnly.desc: Whether the order can only reduce an existing position

context.refundAmountNano.label: Refund amount (for comparison)
context.refundAmountNano.desc: Amount of tokens refunded (for size comparisons)

context.refundAmountUsd.label: Refund amount (USD)
context.refundAmountUsd.desc: USD value of the refunded tokens

context.refundToken.key.address.label: Refund token address
context.refundToken.key.address.desc: Contract address of the refunded token

context.refundToken.key.chain.label: Refund token network
context.refundToken.key.chain.desc: Network where the refund token lives

context.refundToken.key.hlToken.label: Refund token identifier (Hyperliquid)
context.refundToken.key.hlToken.desc: Hyperliquid identifier of the refund token

context.representative.label: Representative address
context.representative.desc: Address of the representative being registered (Aave)

context.representativeChainId.label: Representative's network
context.representativeChainId.desc: ID of the network the representative will cover

context.requestIds.label: Request ID list
context.requestIds.desc: IDs of the withdrawal request NFTs (Lido)

context.reserveState.liquidationThreshol.label: Liquidation threshold (bp)
context.reserveState.liquidationThreshol.desc: Collateral ratio at which liquidation starts (100bp = 1%)

context.reserveState.ltvBp.label: Loan-to-value (bp)
context.reserveState.ltvBp.desc: Share of collateral value that can be borrowed (100bp = 1%)

context.reserveState.reserveFactorBp.label: Reserve factor (bp)
context.reserveState.reserveFactorBp.desc: Share of interest set aside as reserves (100bp = 1%)

context.reserveState.totalBorrow.label: Total borrowed
context.reserveState.totalBorrow.desc: Total amount borrowed in the market (raw)

context.reserveState.totalSupply.label: Total supplied
context.reserveState.totalSupply.desc: Total amount supplied to the market (raw)

context.reserveState.utilizationBp.label: Utilization rate (bp)
context.reserveState.utilizationBp.desc: Share of supplied funds currently borrowed (100bp = 1%)

context.rewardToken.key.address.label: Reward token address
context.rewardToken.key.address.desc: Contract address of the reward token (ERC20)

context.rewardToken.key.chain.label: Reward token network
context.rewardToken.key.chain.desc: Network where the reward token is deployed

context.rewardToken.key.hlToken.label: Reward token identifier (Hyperliquid)
context.rewardToken.key.hlToken.desc: Hyperliquid identifier of the reward token

context.routeEstimatedOut.label: Route estimated output (raw)
context.routeEstimatedOut.desc: Total estimated output of the entire route

context.saleState.hardCap.label: Sale hard cap
context.saleState.hardCap.desc: Maximum amount that can be raised

context.saleState.isActive.label: Sale active flag
context.saleState.isActive.desc: Whether the sale is in progress

context.saleState.softCap.label: Sale soft cap
context.saleState.softCap.desc: Minimum amount for the sale to succeed

context.saleState.vestSchedule.cliff.label: Vesting cliff time
context.saleState.vestSchedule.cliff.desc: No tokens unlock before this time (cliff)

context.saleState.vestSchedule.curve.des.label: Vesting curve description
context.saleState.vestSchedule.curve.des.desc: Description of the custom unlock schedule

context.saleState.vestSchedule.curve.ste.label: Vesting amounts per step
context.saleState.vestSchedule.curve.ste.desc: List of token amounts unlocking at each step

context.saleState.vestSchedule.curve.ste.label: Vesting times per step
context.saleState.vestSchedule.curve.ste.desc: List of times at which each step unlocks

context.saleState.vestSchedule.total.label: Total vesting amount
context.saleState.vestSchedule.total.desc: Total tokens to be released through vesting

context.scope.label: Cancellation scope
context.scope.desc: Cancel specific orders only, or all of them

context.scope.chain.label: Permission network
context.scope.chain.desc: Network the permission scope applies to

context.scope.contract.label: Contract address
context.scope.contract.desc: Address of the contract the permission targets

context.scope.kind.label: Permission kind
context.scope.kind.desc: Kind of permission being revoked (erc20/nft, etc.)

context.scope.mask.label: Permission bitmask
context.scope.mask.desc: Bitmask marking the nonces to invalidate (Permit2)

context.scope.nftKey.address.label: NFT contract address
context.scope.nftKey.address.desc: Address of the NFT collection contract

context.scope.nftKey.contract.label: NFT collection address
context.scope.nftKey.contract.desc: Address of the NFT collection contract

context.scope.spender.label: Spending approval target
context.scope.spender.desc: Contract being granted the right to take my tokens

context.scope.token.key.address.label: Scoped token address
context.scope.token.key.address.desc: Contract address of the token the permission targets

context.scope.token.key.chain.label: Scoped token network
context.scope.token.key.chain.desc: Network where the targeted token lives

context.scope.token.key.hlToken.label: Scoped token identifier (Hyperliquid)
context.scope.token.key.hlToken.desc: Hyperliquid identifier of the targeted token

context.scope.wordPos.label: Permission word position
context.scope.wordPos.desc: Word position where the nonce is stored (Permit2)

context.sell.key.address.label: Sell token address
context.sell.key.address.desc: Contract address of the token being sold

context.sell.key.chain.label: Sell token network

context.sell.key.hlToken.label: Sell token identifier (Hyperliquid)
context.sell.key.hlToken.desc: Hyperliquid identifier of the token being sold

context.sellAmount.label: Sell amount (raw)
context.sellAmount.desc: Amount of tokens the order is selling

context.sellAmountNano.label: Sell amount (for comparison)
context.sellAmountNano.desc: Sell amount used for size comparisons

context.sellAmountUsd.label: Sell amount (USD)
context.sellAmountUsd.desc: USD value of the sell amount

context.shares.label: Shares
context.shares.desc: Internal share units of the protocol (Lido)

context.side.label: Swap side
context.side.desc: Whether the asset is being bought or sold (Aave GHO)

context.sigDeadline.label: Signature deadline
context.sigDeadline.desc: Time the signature expires, Unix seconds

context.signed.label: Pre-signed flag
context.signed.desc: Whether the order is registered as pre-signed (CoW Swap)

context.size.amount.label: Order amount (raw)
context.size.amount.desc: Order amount in raw token units (hex)

context.size.amountDecimal.label: Order amount (decimal)
context.size.amountDecimal.desc: Decimal amount in base asset units (Hyperliquid)

context.size.amountUsdNano.label: Order amount (USD, for comparison)
context.size.amountUsdNano.desc: USD amount used for size comparisons

context.size.collateral.label: Order collateral
context.size.collateral.desc: Amount of collateral committed to the order (raw)

context.size.kind.desc: How the order size is specified

context.size.leverage.label: Order leverage (raw)
context.size.leverage.desc: Leverage of the order, set relative to collateral

context.slippageBp.label: Slippage tolerance
context.slippageBp.desc: Allowed deviation of the fill price from the expected price (100 = 1%)

context.source.chain.label: Source protocol network
context.source.chain.desc: Network of the protocol distributing the airdrop

context.source.market.label: Source sub-market
context.source.market.desc: Sub-market within the protocol (e.g. Morpho Blue)

context.source.name.label: Source protocol name
context.source.name.desc: Protocol distributing the airdrop ("hyperliquid" for Hyperliquid)

context.source.version.label: Source protocol version
context.source.version.desc: Version of the distributing protocol (e.g. v2)

context.sourceDex.label: Source DEX name
context.sourceDex.desc: Name of the DEX the assets leave from (Hyperliquid)

context.spender.label: Spending approval target
context.spender.desc: Contract being granted the right to take my tokens

context.staker.label: Staker address
context.staker.desc: Staker the deposit is made on behalf of (EigenLayer)

context.strategies.label: Strategy contract list
context.strategies.desc: Strategy contracts to withdraw shares from (EigenLayer)

context.supplyApy.label: Supply APY
context.supplyApy.desc: Annual yield earned on supplied assets

context.support.label: Support flag
context.support.desc: True if voting in favor of the proposal

context.swapper.label: Swapper address
context.swapper.desc: Address of the person who placed the order being settled

context.target.desc: Address of the contract being called

context.token.label: Token name
context.token.desc: Name of the token being sent (Hyperliquid)

context.token.key.address.label: Token address
context.token.key.address.desc: Contract address of the ERC20 token

context.tokenIn.key.address.label: Input token address

context.tokenIn.key.hlToken.desc: Hyperliquid identifier of the input token

context.tokenOut.key.address.desc: Contract address of the output token

context.tokenOut.key.hlToken.desc: Hyperliquid identifier of the output token

context.unrealizedPnlNow.desc: Unrealized profit and loss right now (+/-)

context.user.desc: Address of the user performing the action

context.userAccountState.totalCollateral.desc: Total collateral value of the account

context.userCap.label: Per-user cap
context.userCap.desc: Maximum amount a single user can commit

context.userCommitted.desc: Amount I have committed so far

context.userStateBefore.availableBorrowU.desc: Amount that can still be borrowed before the trade (USD)

context.userStateBefore.totalCollatUsd.desc: Total collateral value before the trade (USD)

context.usesConduit.desc: Whether the transfer routes through a conduit (Seaport)

context.value.desc: Native coin (ETH) amount sent along with the call

context.venue.adapter.desc: Address of the adapter connecting to the protocol (Aave V3)

context.venue.baseAsset.key.hlToken.label: Base asset identifier (Hyperliquid)
context.venue.baseAsset.key.hlToken.desc: Hyperliquid identifier of the protocol's base asset

context.venue.binStep.label: Bin step (Trader Joe LB)
context.venue.binStep.desc: Spacing between liquidity bins, in bp

context.venue.chain.label: Protocol network
context.venue.chain.desc: Blockchain network the protocol is deployed on

context.venue.comet.label: Comet market contract address
context.venue.comet.desc: Address of the lending market contract (Compound V3)

context.venue.comptroller.desc: Address of the contract managing all markets (Compound V2)

context.venue.contract.desc: Address of the contract processing the order

context.venue.distributor.desc: Contract distributing fees to lock participants (Curve)

context.venue.escrow.desc: Contract that locks CRV to create voting power (Curve)

context.venue.executor.desc: Contract that actually executes the swap (1inch)

context.venue.factory.label: Factory address
context.venue.factory.desc: Address of the factory that creates pools (Uniswap V2)

context.venue.feeTierBp.label: Fee tier (Uniswap V3)
context.venue.feeTierBp.desc: Fee rate of the pool, in bp

context.venue.gauge.desc: Reward gauge where LP tokens are staked (Curve)

context.venue.governance.desc: Address of the contract managing proposals (Aave)

context.venue.gsm.label: GHO mint/redeem module address
context.venue.gsm.desc: Contract that mints or redeems GHO (Aave)

context.venue.hooks.desc: Address of the hook contract attached to the pool

context.venue.isMeta.desc: Whether the pool is a metapool (Curve)

context.venue.minter.desc: Contract that mints accrued CRV rewards (Curve)

context.venue.module.label: Safety module address
context.venue.module.desc: Safety module where tokens are staked (Aave)

context.venue.nCoins.label: Pool coin count (Curve)
context.venue.nCoins.desc: Number of token types in the pool

context.venue.name.label: Protocol name
context.venue.name.desc: Identifying name of the swap/pool protocol (e.g. Uniswap V3)

context.venue.pair.label: Pair contract address (Trader Joe LB)
context.venue.pair.desc: Address of the token pair trading contract

context.venue.pool.label: Pool address
context.venue.pool.desc: Address of the pool where the trade happens

context.venue.poolManager.label: Pool manager address (Uniswap V4)
context.venue.poolManager.desc: Address of the contract managing all pools

context.venue.reactor.desc: Address of the reactor that settles orders

context.venue.router.desc: Address of the router relaying the swap (1inch)

context.venue.settlement.desc: Address of the contract that settles trades

context.venue.stakeToken.label: Staking token contract address
context.venue.stakeToken.desc: Umbrella vault that receives the stake (Aave)

context.venue.token.key.address.desc: Contract address of the token carrying voting power

context.venue.token.key.chain.desc: Network where the voting token lives

context.venue.token.key.hlToken.desc: Hyperliquid identifier of the voting token

context.venue.vault.desc: Address of the Vault pooling swap funds

context.venue.votingMachine.desc: Address of the contract that tallies votes (Aave)

context.victim.label: Liquidation target address
context.victim.desc: Address of the account being liquidated

context.victimState.availableBorrowUsd.desc: Amount the liquidation target can still borrow (USD)

context.victimState.totalDebtUsd.desc: Total debt of the liquidation target (USD)

context.votingPower.desc: Amount of voting power being delegated (raw)

context.wei.desc: Amount of tokens being delegated or undelegated (wei)

context.withdrawable.label: Withdrawable amount

context.withdrawer.desc: Address that receives the funds after withdrawal
